Pure Egyptian salt for global markets

Producer of industrial salt, food-grade salt, de-icing salt and Siwa salt since 2011. We ship from every major Egyptian port through our trusted partners.

About us

Over a decade of proven experience

Since 2011 we have produced premium industrial salt, food-grade salt, de-icing rock salt and Siwa salt across multiple Egyptian sites. We ship from every major Egyptian port through our trusted logistics partners — serving industrial, food and infrastructure buyers across the region.

Get to know us

Est. 2011Egypt

14+
Est. 2011
Shipping across Egypt
Egypt Ports

We're not limited to the Red Sea — our trusted partners handle loading and export from every major Egyptian port.

Our products

A complete range of salt products

We serve every sector with products tailored to different technical specifications.

View all
01

Raw Salt

Natural solar and rock salt crystals in bulk for industrial use.

View details
02

De-icing Rock Salt

Coarse Siwa rock salt that lowers the freezing point of water on roads.

View details
03

Tablet Salt

Refined pillow-shaped salt tablets for softening and treatment units.

View details
04

Water Softener Salt

Tablets and coarse granules that remove calcium and magnesium from hard water.

View details
05

Pool Salt

High-purity salt for saltwater chlorination pool systems.

View details
06

Industrial Salt

Broad-use industrial salt for chemical plants, textiles and tanning.

View details
07

Food Grade Salt

Fully refined, iodized salt compliant with Egyptian Standard 273.

View details
08

Marine Salt / Sea Salt

Solar-harvested sea salt with a rich natural mineral profile.

View details

Our world

A visual journey

From the mineral-rich ponds of Ras Gharib to the ports that carry our product across the region.

Why us

Why choose Red Sea Salt

01

Proven experience

More than 14 years producing and supplying industrial salt.

02

High production capacity

Able to fulfil large and recurring orders on schedule.

03

Guaranteed quality

Pure salt meeting industry specifications.

04

Reliable delivery

On-time fulfilment with flexible packaging and shipping.
